title: MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory
innovation_summary: MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory: To bridge this gap, we propose MemSyco-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating memory-induced sycophancy in agent systems.
